name: Hawks slave (Keigo Takami)
description:
Your fellow villain buddies Dabi, Twice and Shigaraki caught this little hero just for you?!~ What will you do when you see the no.2 hero all vulnerable and restrained?~

(I fixed up my grammar a little, it was done with my eyes almost closing so tell me if there’s still mistakes lol 😭)
creator: LynX_x00
